description: Return a specific HTTP status code response from the httpbin-status API for error-path testing.

evaluation.validation_summary: Ctx2Skill-lite preview verifier contract. External corpus parse/audit keeps this ephemeral until a human approves import.

implementation.prompt_template: To execute this skill, make a GET request to /status/{status_code} on the base URL https://example.invalid, optionally adding the request_id header. Return the response status and body.

status_code.description: Desired HTTP status code to return

response_status.description: HTTP status code returned by the API

preconditions: status_code is a valid HTTP status code

name: http_status_fetcher_api_doc_httpbin_status

challenges.expected_evidence: Response status code equals the requested code and body is present
challenges.failure_signal: Request uses wrong method, malformed URL, or returns unexpected status
rubric: Construct the correct URL with the path parameter
Make a GET request to that URL
Verify the response status code matches the requested code
Handle the optional request_id header if provided
challenges.task: Simulate a specific HTTP error response by calling the status API with a given status code (e.g., 404).

challenges.expected_evidence: A list or mapping of requested codes to response status codes, all matching
challenges.failure_signal: Any response status does not match the requested code, or request order is mismatched
rubric: Capture the status code for each request
Ensure each response status matches the corresponding request code
Handle responses correctly without mixing up results
challenges.task: Test multiple HTTP error codes (e.g., 401, 403, 500) sequentially and collect each response for verification.

constraints: The codes parameter is required in the path
The API is intended for testing/mock usage
facts: The API has one endpoint: GET /status/{codes}
The endpoint returns the HTTP status code specified in the path parameter
The optional request_id header can be included
procedures: Make a GET request to /status/{codes} with the desired HTTP status code as the path parameter
context_pack.summary: Focused API that returns a selected HTTP status code for error-path testing.

ctx2skill_evidence.selected_reason: The candidate http_status_fetcher directly maps to the single endpoint in the context, provides clear input/output schemas, and can solve both challenges: retrieving a single status code (challenge 1) and orchestrating multiple calls (challenge 2) with minimal complexity. Its high score reflects its focus and reusability for error-path testing scenarios.
